concept: Industrial Garage Command Center - A high-visibility, tactical dashboard optimized for mechanic workflows. Focuses on dense data clarity, rigid structures, and rugged industrial aesthetics using safety yellow accents against deep obsidian.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-black uppercase tracking-tighter leading-none

layout_spacing.surface_treatment: Tactile minimalism: 1px solid stroke (border-neutral-800), no soft shadows. Use sharp inner glow (shadow-[inset_0_1px_0_rgba(255,255,255,0.05)]) for depth.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FFD600] text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-widest px-6 py-3 hover:bg-[#FACC15] transition-colors border border-transparent focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FFD600] focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-black
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-widest px-6 py-3 border border-neutral-700 hover:border-white hover:bg-neutral-800 transition-colors

cards.container: bg-[#171717] border border-neutral-800 p-6 flex flex-col gap-4 relative overflow-hidden
cards.header: flex justify-between items-start border-b border-neutral-800 pb-4 mb-2

inputs.text: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-neutral-800 text-white p-3 w-full focus:border-[#FFD600] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FFD600] outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-neutral-600 font-mono text-sm
inputs.label: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-neutral-400 mb-2 block

status_badge.base: px-2 py-1 text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-wider border

icons_and_media.icon_style: bold or duotone depending on context. Focus on sharp, mechanical shapes.

login_hero.description: Dimly lit garage workshop to be used as a dark atmospheric background for the login/auth screen with a heavy black/gradient overlay.

car_placeholder.description: Parked black car in dark lighting. Use as a placeholder for the car photo gallery when a user hasn't uploaded photos yet.

mechanic_avatar.description: Mechanic in gloves inspecting car engine. Use as a placeholder for the mechanic's profile picture or reference image in the mechanic workflow section.

animation_and_motion.philosophy: Crisp, mechanical, immediate. No sluggish fades.
animation_and_motion.hover_states: Instant background color shifts and border highlights.
animation_and_motion.loading: Use an indeterminate progress bar at the top edge of cards (like a tracing beam) rather than central spinners.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over dark backgrounds maintains at least 4.5:1 ratio. The pure white on obsidian provides maximum APCA contrast.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a responsive web application designed mobile-first since mechanics will use this on tablets/phones in the workshop.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for main structure, heavily customized Shadcn components for forms, dialogs, and selects.
Strip out Shadcn's default soft borders and border-radius. Override `rounded-md` with `rounded-none` or `rounded-sm`. Replace default gray borders with `border-neutral-800`.
Implement Google Login for Owner and Mechanic roles.
The layout must feel like a tactical command center: dark mode by default, high density, and utilizing the 'Control Room' bento grid.
Forms for intake and mechanic findings should use monospace fonts for inputs to simulate data entry terminals.
Use the provided image URLs as fallbacks and background ambiance, ensuring text over the login image uses `bg-black/80` or gradient overlays to remain legible.
